title: FalseMemory
description: "You’re alone. You’re sure of it. Right?"
body:
🧠 False Memory

"You’re alone. You’re sure of it. Right?"

False Memory is a subtle psychological horror mod that amplifies Minecraft’s quiet loneliness. There are no monsters to fight, no jumpscares to dodge—just a growing sense that something is… off.

Designed to keep you questioning what’s real and what you remember, this mod adds ambient unease to your survival or exploration experience without disrupting the core Minecraft gameplay loop.

Whether you're deep in a mineshaft or building peacefully on the surface, False Memory lurks beneath the surface of your perception—quiet, atmospheric, and unforgettable.

🎧 Best experienced with:

Headphones

Minimal mods for immersion

A new world… or an old one you think you know
